description.en: The<path>SVGelement is the generic element to define a shape. All the basic shapes can be created with a path element.

excerpt.es: The<path>SVGelement is the generic element to define a shape. All the basic shapes can be created with a path element.

description.en: The<pattern>SVGelement defines a graphics object which can be redrawn at repeated x- and y-coordinate intervals ("tiled") to cover an area.

excerpt.es: The<pattern>SVGelement defines a graphics object which can be redrawn at repeated x- and y-coordinate intervals ("tiled") to cover an area.
excerpt.en: The<pattern>SVGelement defines a graphics object which can be redrawn at repeated x- and y-coordinate intervals ("tiled") to cover an area.

description.en: The<polygon>SVGelement defines a closed shape consisting of a set of connected straight line segments. The last point is connected to the first point.

excerpt.es: The<polygon>SVGelement defines a closed shape consisting of a set of connected straight line segments. The last point is connected to the first point.
excerpt.en: The<polygon>SVGelement defines a closed shape consisting of a set of connected straight line segments. The last point is connected to the first point.

description.en: The<polyline>SVGelement is an SVG basic shape that creates straight lines connecting several points. Typically apolylineis used to create open shapes as the last point doesn't have to be connected to
